slides.title: Practice the *lift*
slides.body: Strength is skill. Do the big lifts often.

slides.title: Add weight *slowly*
slides.body: Small jumps weekly beat ego maxes.

slides.title: Fuel the *strength*
slides.body: Strength needs food and sleep, just like size.

slides.title: Get *strong*.
slides.body: Vibe Health ties your training, food and sleep together.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store
